<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Argument\Geospatial; class ByRadius extends AbstractBy { private const KEYWORD = 'BYRADIUS'; /** * @var int */ private $radius; public function __construct(int $radius, string $unit) { $this->radius = $radius; $this->setUnit($unit); } /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function toArray(): array { return [self::KEYWORD, $this->radius, $this->unit]; } }
